tips.name: Pomodoro Technique
tips.description: Work 25 min, break 5 min. Repeat 4 times.

steps.title: Choose a task
steps.fullDescription: Select one specific task you want to accomplish.
steps.tip: Start with the most important task

steps.title: Set timer
steps.fullDescription: Start the timer for 25 minutes. Focus only on your chosen task.

steps.title: Take break
steps.fullDescription: Step away from your desk. Stretch your legs, drink water.

tips.name: No Phone Rule
tips.description: Keep phone away during work sessions

steps.title: Put phone away
steps.fullDescription: Physically place your phone in another room.

steps.title: Use Focus Mode
steps.fullDescription: Enable Do Not Disturb mode on all your devices.

steps.title: Check on breaks
steps.fullDescription: Only check your phone during scheduled breaks.

steps.title: Write task
steps.fullDescription: Write down exactly what you need to accomplish.

steps.title: Block distractions
steps.fullDescription: Close all unnecessary browser tabs.

steps.title: Work until ring
steps.fullDescription: Do not switch tasks until the timer rings.

steps.title: Stand up
steps.fullDescription: Stand up from your desk. Stretch your arms, legs, and back.

steps.title: Drink water
steps.fullDescription: Drink a glass of water. Dehydration causes fatigue.

steps.title: Deep breaths
steps.fullDescription: Take 5 deep breaths. Inhale slowly, exhale slowly.

steps.title: Block time
steps.fullDescription: Schedule 90 minutes when you won't be disturbed.

steps.title: Eliminate distractions
steps.fullDescription: Put phone away. Close unnecessary tabs.

steps.title: Focus deeply
steps.fullDescription: Work on a single demanding task requiring concentration.

steps.title: Wake up early
steps.fullDescription: Wake up at the same time every day. Avoid snooze.

steps.title: Hydrate
steps.fullDescription: Drink a glass of water first thing.

steps.title: Plan
steps.fullDescription: Write your top 3 priorities for the day.

steps.title: Quiet place
steps.fullDescription: Find a quiet place where you won't be disturbed.

steps.title: Focus on breath
steps.fullDescription: Close your eyes. Focus on your breath as it goes in and out.

steps.title: Return slowly
steps.fullDescription: Slowly open your eyes. Notice how you feel.

steps.title: Set bedtime
steps.fullDescription: Set a bedtime and stick to it, even on weekends.

steps.title: No screens
steps.fullDescription: Avoid phones and computers 1 hour before bed.

steps.title: Relaxing routine
steps.fullDescription: Create a relaxing bedtime routine: dim lights, calm music.
